titleStmt.title: SII 33.236: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 236. (A.R. No. B 278 of 1953.) Kanuparti, Ongole Taluk, Guntur District.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1348 (gaja-abdhi-jvalana-śaśi), Parābhava, Māgha śu. 11, Thursday corresponding to 1427 A.D. January 9.

States that the chief Aubhaḷa-kshāpati, son of Nūṁkabhūpāla remitted certain taxes on the temple and Brāhmaṇa holdings in Kōśāṁbikāpuri situated at the confluence of the Brahmakuṇḍi, 12 yōjanas to the east of Śrīśaila. Further, it records the gift of some land at Kanupaṟṟu by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vira-Ālamandala Nūṁkayadēva Chōda-mahārāja, for the merit of Vīra-Dēvarāya-mahārāja, his queen Dēmā-ammaṅgāru and the crown prince Vijaya Bukkarāya. Published; NDI., Vol. II, No. 55 & 56.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmacchākē gajābdhi
jvalana śaśimitē śrī pa
parādau bhavābdē māghē
māsē sitē(tai)kādaśi tithi sa
mayē brahmakuṁḍyabdhi
yōgē śrīśailasyēṁdra
bhāgē nayana śaśimitai
ryyōjanai saṁstitāyā
puṇyakōśāṁbikāpu
ryapica daśaśatastāṇu
liṁgākarābhūt .
bhūpālairātmatulyairbha
va śaraṇa viprārddhirtthitō
grapratāpa śrīmadvi
bhaḷakṣmāpati rinakulajō
nūṁkabhūpālasūnu
tasyāṁ bhuktakṣitibhyaśya
timata vimalādārava
dbrāhmaṇēbhyaścāṣṭaiśva
ryāṣṭabhōgānvita sukha
makarōdyāvadāditya
caṁdrau .
Digital edition of SII 33.236 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
